A.evidence: Faithful prose (even preserves source glyph artifacts 'ıs/łis') and correct LaTeX eq.1 with \tag{1}; but Table 1 and Table 2 merge data into the header cell leaving the value column empty ('Rated Phase Current... 9.2A (8.6A)' | blank; 'Ball Exposure Area Percentage 82%' | blank), and Table 3 has spurious trailing empty columns.

B.evidence: Tables 1 and 3 structurally correct but Table 2 has the same header-merge error; eq.1 mangled (denominator split as r0/a then 2/(2λl)N, exponent becomes e^{-ρ/2 x} instead of e^{-α/l x}); title downgraded to H2 as 'small Size League' and a/l symbol words dropped from text.

C.evidence: All three tables including Table 2 are structurally correct (best tables), but eq.1 is emitted as '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->', dribbler bullets reordered (Self-Centering before Shock Absorption), and figure-label text is dumped into body ('DM3519 FOC controller X4 High power board...', '(1) ball leaving', '2023-4 SSL Robot Design').

D.evidence: Clean faithful prose and near-correct LaTeX eq.1 (only drops one 'l' in a/2λl); goes furthest into the paper, but Table 2 (Essential Physical Specifications) is omitted entirely and all headings are rendered as plain text without markdown hierarchy (# markers).
